reviews.comment:
Paro acá siempre que viajo con mis mascotas es ideal ya que tiene mucho verde y mesas afuera para tomar o comer algo. Servicio de drugstore muy saturado y no dan a basto cuando son fechas especiales. Atención del personal muy buena. Lugar limpio. Baños siempre limpios.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop here when I travel with my pets; it's ideal because it has lots of greenery and outdoor tables for drinks and food. The drugstore is very busy and they can't keep up with demand during peak seasons. The staff is very helpful. The place is clean. The restrooms are always clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPejRHdGJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio accesible, que les queda de paso para los viajantes, con un predio arbolado para estacionarse, con baños, con lugar para tomar un café, o comprar comida rápida, tambien cuenta con lugar para sentarse al aire libre. Excelente atencion.

(Translated by Google)
It's an easily accessible gas station, convenient for travelers, with a wooded parking area, restrooms, a place to get coffee or buy fast food, and outdoor seating. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbDhhWnpBRRAB
